title: Dream App
html:
Yahir's recurring product idea, first sketched in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream: "App where you say your dream stream of consciousness, ChatGPT make sure more concise, then an image or video is produced." Listed twice as a todo. The earliest fully-articulated ChatGPT-powered consumer-app concept in the corpus — pre-dates the AEO/Rankett pivot by 3 years. Sits inside the cluster as a dormant but never-killed idea.

TL;DR

  • 15 inbound citations across 2019 → 2025 — small absolute number but covers half a decade.
  • Origin moment: 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream / 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal — listed twice as a todo, suggesting Yahir himself flagged its recurrence-importance.
  • Pre-2022 roots: 2019 08 26 dream of dads key (the dad-key dream that Yahir kept journaling) seeded the idea-shape; 2020 09 28 experience qb question / 2020 10 15 10 15 20 are adjacent dream-as-input thinking.
  • Post-2022 echoes: 2023 05 13 ideas list / 2023 05 13 ideas startup dump, 2024 09 05 building phase work blueprint, 2025 08 16 that girl type app — same idea-shape resurfacing.
  • The concept anticipates GenAI consumer apps that exploded in 2023–2024 (Lensa, Midjourney consumer wrappers) — Yahir had the shape before the toolchain caught up.

Why this idea keeps recurring

  1. Dream-content is high-prompt-density. Stream-of-consciousness is the perfect format for AI conciseness + image-generation pipelines.
  2. Personal artifact + shareable image = inherent virality format.
  3. The infrastructure now exists. What was unbuildable in 2022 (vision models, decent text-to-image) is commodity in 2026.
  4. Crosses Yahir's cluster. Sister to outpace, swipr, wagerwrld — consumer apps under VRTL Pirates umbrella.
  5. Surfaces in the Ahmad Jamal → Rankett through line query — Yahir notices the same instinct keeps appearing.

Surfaces in queries

  • ahmad jamal to rankett throughline — query that surfaces this idea
  • 2026 04 27 1950 what was i writing about in 2022 2023 that i forgot — finds the dream-app as exactly the kind of forgotten thread the query asks about

Source summaries

All 10 direct citations:

  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — origin moment

  • 2025 08 16 that girl type app — recent echo

  • 2023 05 13 ideas startup dump

  • 2020 10 15 10 15 20
  • 2019 07 24 decide on best gaming laptop
